siteMetadata.title: Occupy Matrix
siteMetadata.subtitle: Personal blog by Murat Sutunc. I write about business, strategy & code.

markdownRemark.html:
I am an ex-Microsoft developer, IEEE paper co-author and baby diaper inventor. As a passionate entrepreneur, I write code to flatten the world and to automate unpleasant processes.

I love coding and reading about business strategy. Priceonomics, Coding Horror, and Wait But Why are just amazing blogs. I also highly recommend anyone to watch Kurzgesagt, The School of Life and Y Combinator youtube channels.
